lead: The landscape of AI continues to evolve, with companies integrating AI into various sectors, addressing ethical concerns, and navigating public perception amidst growing skepticism.

stories.title: WeChat begins testing Xiaowei as Tencent eyes a Q3 AI rollout
stories.summary: Tencent is integrating its AI assistant, Xiaowei, into WeChat, aiming to enhance user experience without requiring separate downloads for a chatbot. This move reflects a strategic approach to leverage the app's multifunctionality, allowing users to engage with AI seamlessly while messaging, shopping, and more.

stories.title: NAB builds integrated ops hub for threat intelligence
stories.summary: The National Australia Bank (NAB) is establishing an integrated operations hub focused on threat intelligence. This initiative aims to improve collaboration among tech, cyber, and fraud teams, enhancing the bank's ability to respond to security threats using AI-driven insights.

stories.title: AI 도입 넘어 비용 관리로…오픈AI, 사용량 분석·예산 설정 기능 공개
stories.summary: OpenAI has introduced new features for its ChatGPT Enterprise that allow businesses to monitor AI usage and set budgets. This shift highlights a growing focus on managing AI costs and ensuring that investments translate into tangible business outcomes.

stories.title: “AI가 탈락 결정에 영향 줬다면 책임” 워크데이 소송이 바꿀 채용 AI 규제 지형
stories.summary: A recent court ruling regarding Workday's AI hiring tools has significant implications for AI regulations in recruitment. The court determined that companies could be held accountable for biases in AI-driven hiring processes, emphasizing the need for transparency and fairness in AI applications.

stories.title: London’s Isometric lands $40M to certify the industrial economy with AI
stories.summary: Isometric has secured $40 million in funding to enhance its AI-driven certification processes for the industrial economy. This investment aims to streamline verification and compliance, showcasing AI's role in improving operational efficiency in industrial sectors.

stories.title: Brands using AI-generated influencers to promote products on social media
stories.summary: An investigation reveals that brands are increasingly employing AI-generated influencers for marketing on social media, raising ethical concerns about transparency. This trend highlights the growing intersection of AI and marketing, prompting calls for clearer guidelines on the use of AI in consumer engagement.

stories.title: AI 도입 넘어 비용 관리로…오픈AI, 사용량 분석·예산 설정 기능 공개
stories.summary: OpenAI has introduced new features for its ChatGPT Enterprise that allow businesses to monitor AI usage and set budgets. This shift highlights a growing focus on managing AI costs and ensuring that investments translate into tangible business outcomes.
